title: anthoxanthum occidentale
intro: Anthoxanthum occidentale, also known as western sweet grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is known for its sweet fragrance and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Anthoxanthum occidentale include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Anthoxanthum occidentale include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
